name: Snowdrop Community Edition
description: Free, self-hostable MCP server with 1,500+ financial modeling, compliance, DeFi, GCP, and infrastructure skills. No authentication required. For premium skills with JWT auth, connect to the Cloud Run endpoint.

authentication.description: Community edition — no authentication required. For premium skills, connect to https://snowdrop-mcp-aiuy7uvasq-uc.a.run.app/mcp with an ES256 JWT Bearer token.

skills.name: MCP Tool Access
skills.description: Access all 1,500+ Snowdrop skills via 3 dispatcher meta-tools: snowdrop_list_skills, snowdrop_search_skills, snowdrop_execute.
examples: Calculate IRR for a set of cash flows
Run MiCA asset classification on a token
